source_file: education Extension of abeyance of applicability of revised Comprehensive Guidelines for conducting competitive written public exam. dated.txt
verbatim_text:
No. P -13013/75/2023 -Policy -DD-III 
Government of India  
Ministry of Social Justice& Empowerment  
Department of Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities (Divyangjan)  
*** 
Pt. Deendayal Antyodaya Bhawan,  
C.G.O. Complex, New Delhi -110003  
Date:      30  December, 2025  
Office Memorandum  
  
Subject:     Extension of abeyance of applicability of revised Comprehensive 
Guidelines for conducting competitive written public examinations dated 01.08.2025 
for Persons with Disabilities under the RPwD Act, 2016 -reg. 
  
The undersigned is directed to refer to this Department’s Office Memorandum 
dated 01.08.2025, vide which the Guidelines for conduct of written examinations for 
Persons with Benchmark Disabilities (PwBDs) were revised, and to the subsequent 
Office Memorandum da ted 10.09.2025, wherein it was clarified that, in view of the 
preparedness of examining bodies and in the interest of the Divyangjan community, all 
competitive public examinations notified or to be notified up to and including 31.12.2025 
would continue to be conducted as per the Guidelines dated 29.08.2018, the subsequent 
corrigendum thereto, and the Guidelines issued on 10.08.2022.  
  
2.       In continuation thereof, and in view of the ongoing stakeholder consultations with 
examining bodies and organizatio ns representing persons with disabilities, it has been 
decided, with the approval of the competent authority, to extend the abeyance of 
applicability of the revised Guidelines dated 01.08.2025 beyond 31.12.2025 and up to 
31.03.2026.  
  
3.       Accordingly,  all competitive public examinations notified or to be notified up to 
and including 31.03.2026 shall continue to be conducted in accordance with the 
Guidelines dated 29.08.2018, the subsequent corrigendum thereto, and the Guidelines 
issued on 10.08.2022.  
4.       This issues with the approval of the competent authority.  
  
(Debala Bhattacharjee)  
Under Secretary to the Government of India  
(Email: debala.joarder@gov.in)  
 To, 
1. The Secretary, all Ministries/Department as per standard list  
2. The Chairperson, UPS C, Shahjahan Road, New Delhi.  
3. The Chairperson, SSC, Block No.12, CGO Complex, Lodhi Road, New Delhi -
110003.  
4. The Chairperson, University Grants Commission Chairperson, Bahadurshah Zafar 
Marg, New Delhi -110002  
5. The Chairperson, Railway Board, M/o Railways  
6. The Chairperson, National Testing Agency, First Floor, NSIC -MDBP Building, 
Okhla Industrial Estate, New Delhi, Delhi 110020  
7. The Chairman, IBPS  
8. The Chairman, CBSE, CBSE Integrated Office Complex, Sector -23, Phase - I, 
Dwarka New Delhi - 110077  
9. All National In stitutes and RCI under the administrative control of Department of 
Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities (Divyangjan), Ministry of SJ&E, New 
Delhi  
  
Copy for information to:    
1. O/o the Chief Commissioner for Persons with Disabilities, Dwarka, New Delhi  
2. The Director, IT Cell, DEPwD with a request to kindly arrange uploading the OM to 
DEPwD website at the link https://depwd.gov.in/guidelines -2/ and also under what’s  
New  section

Section 17 – Specific measures including teacher training and accessible materials
